question: What color is the sky on Florpion during daytime?

answers.original: The sky on Florpion appears chartreuse during daytime.
answers.perturbed: The context does not provide information about the color of the sky on Florpion during daytime.

entities.name: Florpion
entities.description: Florpion is a planet with unique atmospheric and geological characteristics.

entities.name: Chartreuse Sky
entities.description: The chartreuse sky on Florpion is due to light refraction through kryponite particles.
